data.title: Dogecoin Holds $0.15 as Analysts Highlight New Support and a Clear Path Ahead
data.description:
Dogecoin is trading around $0. 152–$0. 153 after a choppy week, holding steady above short-term support despite wider market hesitation. The latest TradingView chart shows DOGE repeatedly defending the mid-$0

data.title: Whale Address Receives Significant ENA Transfer Amid Losses
data.description: According to Foresight News, monitoring by The Data Nerd reveals that an hour ago, a whale address starting with 0xaf3 received 3.4 million ENA tokens, valued at approximately $953,000, from Wintermute. Over the past 10 months, this address has accumulated a total of 10.59 million ENA tokens, worth around $6.5 million, with an average purchase price of about $0.614 per token. Currently, the address is experiencing a floating loss of approximately $2.97 million, resulting in an investment return rate of -45.7%.

data.title: Nina Rong Appointed as Growth Executive Director at BNB Chain
data.description: According to Odaily, BNB Chain has announced that Nina Rong has been appointed as its Growth Executive Director. In her new role, Rong will focus on ecosystem development, enhancing developer support, and expanding the global presence of BNB Chain.

data.title: SUN Token Buyback and Destruction Completed Successfully
data.description: According to Odaily, SUN.io has announced the successful completion of its 49th SUN token buyback and destruction. Between November 3 and November 27, 2025 (UTC+8), a total of 2,151,137.8724 SUN tokens were permanently destroyed by transferring them to a black hole address, effectively reducing the circulating supply of SUN tokens. Since December 15, 2021 (UTC+8), a cumulative total of 650,686,380.77 SUN tokens have been bought back and destroyed. This initiative significantly decreases the overall market circulation of SUN tokens, enhancing the perception of their scarcity and establishing a sustainable foundation for potential value growth.

data.title: Gate has urgently established a HK$10 million relief fund to support disaster relief efforts in Hong Kong following the fires.
data.description: According to official sources, Gate has established an emergency HK$10 million relief fund specifically to support the livelihood assistance of residents affected by the Tai Po fire in Hong Kong and subsequent community reconstruction efforts. Funds will be allocated in phases and continuously invested based on actual needs. Gate expressed its respect for the firefighters and rescue personnel battling the blaze and pledged to continue monitoring the situation and fully assisting the affected communities in overcoming this difficult time.

data.title: Solana ETF Experiences First Net Outflow After 22 Days of Inflows
data.description: According to Odaily, Solana ETF has ended its 22-day streak of net inflows, recording its first single-day net outflow of $8.2 million. Among the outflows, 21Shares experienced the highest amount. Meanwhile, BitwiseInvest continued its trend of net inflows, with an additional $13.3 million in funds.

data.title: Qilin Ransomware Group Targets South Korean IT Firm in Major Data Breach
data.description: According to PANews, the Qilin ransomware group has executed a significant supply chain attack on South Korean IT service provider GJTec, resulting in the theft of 2TB of data, including over one million files. This breach has impacted 28 financial companies. Bitdefender's investigation suggests a connection between this operation and the North Korean-backed APT group 'Moonstone Sleet,' which is suspected to be collaborating with the Russian-speaking Qilin organization. The attack appears to be aimed at exerting pressure on the South Korean financial market.

data.title: BNB Chain appoints Nina Rong as Executive Director of Growth
data.description: BNB Chain announced that Nina Rong has been appointed as its Executive Director of Growth. Nina Rong will primarily be responsible for ecosystem development, strengthening developer support, and expanding its global footprint.

data.title: Wrench Attack Hits Altman’s Ex: $11M in Crypto Stolen in Home Heist
data.description:
Lachy Groom, a venture capitalist and ex-partner of Sam Altman, was the victim of a $11M crypto theft in a sophisticated wrench attack. The assailant impersonated a delivery worker, restrained Groom, and drained his crypto wallets over 90 minutes, spotlighting the rising threat of targeted attacks against prominent cryptocurrency holders. The post Wrench Attack Hits Altman’s Ex: $11M in Crypto Stolen in Home Heist first appeared on The Shib Daily.
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/11/27/wrench-attack-hits-altmans-ex-11m-in-crypto-stolen-in-home-heist/

data.title: Next Crypto To Explode As Strategy Proves Bitcoin Reserves Can Easily Cover Its Debt
data.description:
What to Know: Strategy’s new ‘Bitcoin Rating’ shows its $BTC stack covers convertible debt by about 5. 9x at its average entry and would stay near 2x even in a deep crash, underlining how levered it is to long-term $BTC upside. Despite that cushion, institutions are bailing on the stock and moving into spot Bitcoin ETFs instead, leaving Strategy out of the S&P 500 and trading below the value of its own $BTC holdings. Bitcoin Hyper’s presale is building an SVM-based Bitcoin Layer 2 with near-instant, low-fee smart contracts and DeFi that settles back to Bitcoin, giving $BTC holders a scaling and yield angle instead of just spot exposure
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/next-crypto-to-explode-strategy-proves-bitcoin-reserve-covers-debts/

data.title: McGregor Slams Khabib’s NFTs, Crypto Sleuth Calls Out His Own Token Flop
data.description:
Conor McGregor slammed Khabib Nurmagomedov’s NFT drop, only to be called out by blockchain sleuth ZachXBT for his own failed meme coin, REAL. The feud spotlights growing demands for accountability and transparency in celebrity-backed crypto projects, as fans and analysts monitor launches closely. The post McGregor Slams Khabib’s NFTs, Crypto Sleuth Calls Out His Own Token Flop first appeared on The Shib Daily.
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/11/27/mcgregor-slams-khabibs-nfts-crypto-sleuth-calls-out-his-own-token-flop/

data.title: Solana ETF ends 22-day streak of net inflows
data.description: According to SolanaFloor monitoring, the Solana ETF ended its 22-day streak of net inflows, recording its first single-day net outflow yesterday, amounting to $8.2 million, with 21Shares experiencing the largest outflow. BitwiseInvest, on the other hand, continued its net inflow trend, with an additional $13.3 million flowing in.

data.title: Ark Invest Expands Crypto Exposure, Positioning for a December Macro Shift
data.description:
Cathie Wood’s Ark Invest is doubling down on crypto exposure, ramping up its purchases of Coinbase and Bitcoin-linked ETFs as the firm positions for what it believes will be a near-term easing in market stress.
source: https://cryptodnes.bg/en/ark-invest-expands-crypto-exposure-positioning-for-a-december-macro-shift/

data.title: Ethereum raises block gas limit to 60M as ecosystem throughput hits new records ahead of Fusaka upgrade
data.description:
Ethereum increased its block gas limit to 60 million after securing majority validator support days before the Fusaka upgrade.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/380687/ethereum-block-gas-limit-fusaka?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: A whale opened a long position in BTC 18 months later and is currently showing a floating profit of $4.39 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a major whale opened an 18x leveraged long position in BTC after an 18-month hiatus, currently showing a floating profit of $4.39 million. The position was valued at $56.7 million, with an opening price of $84,306 and a liquidation price of $78,642.

data.title: Ethereum increases the block gas limit from 45 million to 60 million.
data.description: According to GasLimit.pics, Ethereum's block gas cap has been increased from 45 million to 60 million following calls from users and developers for increased capacity. Ethereum Foundation researcher Toni Wahrstätter announced the adjustment on the X platform, stating it was the result of a year-long effort by the community to improve the processing power of Ethereum's base layer. He wrote: "Just one year after the community began pushing for an increase in the gas cap, Ethereum is now operating below the 60 million block gas cap. This means a 2x increase in one year—and this is just the beginning." The adjustment automatically took effect on November 25th because more than half of the validators signaled their support, meeting the threshold required by Ethereum's current consensus rules. (The Block)

data.title: Europe’s new chat police: Chat Control legislation nudges forward in the EU
data.description:
EU governments agree to push forward with child sexual abuse “Chat Control” rules, but the compromise keeps voluntary scanning alive, leaving privacy advocates fuming.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/eu-chat-control-regulation-advances-encryption-privacy-debate?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
